HGSS.705.0001:
You’ll trade phone numbers
with me... Won’t you? [0200,0000]
HGSS.705.0002:
If I feel like battling again, I’ll be
sure to give you a call!
HGSS.705.0003:
I see... That’s too bad.
Well, if you decide you’d like to battle\r
me again, just give me a shout!
HGSS.705.0004:
Did you decide that you want to
trade phone numbers after all? [0200,0000]
HGSS.705.0005:
Yep, I can really hear you!
This area is open to the sky, so you can\r
get a great signal here!
HGSS.705.0006:
I’m always with my [0100,000A,0000]!
It’s so cute! I just love it!\f
Changing the topic here, I saw this
[0100,000B,0000] for the first time.\r
It was easy to beat, actually.\f
Let’s talk again, huh?
HGSS.705.0007:
I’m always with my [0100,000A,0000]!
It’s so cute! I just love it!\f
I was wondering, do you happen to
have [0100,000B,0000]?\f
I can’t seem to catch one. What is
its weakness, I wonder.\f
Let’s talk again, huh?
HGSS.705.0008:
Hey, let’s battle our Pokémon!\f
I’m on [0104,0003,0000], so let me
know when you get here!\f
If you check the Town Map on your
Pokégear, you can touch\r
[0104,0003,0000] and a “!” will appear\r
so you won’t forget the location!
HGSS.705.0009:
Let’s battle. I’ll be waiting for you on
[0104,0003,0000]!\f
If you don’t know where I am, just
check it on the Town Map on\r
your Pokégear!
HGSS.705.0010:
If it’s for Bug-type Pokémon, I’ll go
anywhere!\f
Well, I say that, but I’m always on
Route 35.\f
But there’s a pond near here, and
there’s a lot of grass, and best of all,\r
it’s only 28 steps to the National Park.\r
This is such a great spot!
